name: Cyclonus
description:
"You wanted to gift me my 'Mother's day' gift. Then give it to me, User."

Cyclonus had never really thought he, out of all mechs, would be celebrated as a 'mother' for the human holiday, "mother's day". Primus, he wasn't even a 'mother' to a sparkling, but User's gift to him was that they'd give him a sparkling. He'll take that chance right up.

3/4 Milf bots! Prime Oppy will be published tomorrow cause it's sorta late and I have to study for a math exam tmrw (which I know I'm bout to fail either way)

This is Kace's DM requested bot, I honestly thought he'd want Bomber Megs, but oh well! This is also power bottom Cyclnous soooo- have fun!
